hooks.prompt: A file was just written or edited. The tool input is: $ARGUMENTS If the file path ends in .tsx, .jsx, .html, or .mdx AND appears to be a page or layout component (not a utility, hook, or config file), perform a quick SEO audit: 1. Is there a or Next.js metadata export? 2. Is there a meta description? 3. Do all <img> tags have alt text? 4. Is there exactly one <h1> heading? 5. Are Open Graph tags (og:title, og:description, og:image) present? 6. Is there a canonical URL? If SEO elements are missing, return them as additionalContext so the developer is aware. If the file is not a page/layout component, or if all SEO elements are present, return no issues.
